blocks.text: counted. Four minutes and twelve seconds. Then silence.
read every face in the room. Cade looked down. Dean looked at the ceiling. Nadia didn't move at all.

blocks.speaker: Wren Cole
blocks.content: He'll come back down if he wants company.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: I just want to make sure he's okay.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: He's okay. I'll check on him in a bit.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: We're going to head out. Thank you for dinner.
Two voices. One was Marcus. The other didn't come back downstairs.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: We don't know what that was.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: One voice didn't come back down.

blocks.prompt: The second voice. Who does Julian think it was?

options.label: Cade. He said he needed to tell Marcus something.
Nadia. She didn't move once during the argument.
He doesn't know. He won't guess.
